Strategic Acquisition Term Sheet — Project Hinode; subject to FIEA and confidential treatment of undisclosed enumerated material facts and tender-offer facts.
Acquirer: Kurose Tech Holdings K.K. (Hōjin Bangō/Corporate Number: 9012345678901), Registered Address: 2-10-5 Tsukishima, Midori-ku, Shiratsu-shi, Hoshima-ken 104-9999, Japan; main email: ir@kurose-tech.example.jp.
Target: Hikari Advance Logistics K.K. (Hōjin Bangō/Corporate Number: 1312345678902), Headquarters: 1-3-8 Akagawa, Aoba-ku, Aokita-shi, Hoshima-ken 112-8888, Japan; corporate secretariat: sec@hikari-adv.example.jp.
Listing/Regulator Context: Target shares are listed on Kanto Main Exchange (Premier) and filings will be made with the Chūō Securities Authority (fictional domestic regulator) under FIEA tender-offer provisions.
Transaction: Acquirer to commence a tender offer for 51% of outstanding shares at JPY 1,250 per share; board approvals have been obtained but are not yet publicly announced pending KME pre-disclosure procedures.
Financing: Bridge facility to be provided by Seishin Capital Finance G.K.; drawdown proceeds to Acquirer Designated Account at Koganei Future Bank (fictional), Kanda Branch 321, Futsū 0088123; account name: Kurose Tech Holdings K.K.
Local Government/Tax: Shiratsu City Business Registry Code: SHR-14-77219; Hoshima Prefecture Local Enterprise Tax No.: HSP-CE-778-2042; Minato Ward-equivalent Business Tax ID (Target site): AOB-2026-04567.
Governance: Tender committee established; “Director, Legal” (role-only) to coordinate CSA notice and internal approvals; no press releases prior to 2026-07-15 JST without mutual consent.
APPI/My Number: Each party will collect and process personal data in accordance with APPI; Individual Numbers (My Number) shall not be exchanged except as legally required for payroll/withholding; sample My Number 1234-5678-9012 is illustrative and invalid.
Key Personnel: Ms. Aya Tsukada-san (Compliance Officer, Target) to continue through integration; JP Passport: ZT1234568; contact: a.tsukada@hikari-adv.example.jp; tel: 050-8812-3344.
Finance Contact: Mr. Riku Moriyama (Acquirer Treasurer) — email: finance@kurose-tech.example.jp; mobile: 070-9000-1122.
Closing Conditions: Clearance of tender-offer notice by Chūō Securities Authority, acceptance threshold ≥51%, and Kanto Main Exchange notification; these tender-offer facts remain undisclosed to the public until statutory filings.
Notices: Kurose Tech Holdings K.K., Attn: Board Secretariat, 2-10-5 Tsukishima, Midori-ku, Shiratsu-shi, Hoshima-ken 104-9999, Japan; email: board@kurose-tech.example.jp; Public Helpline (non-party): 0120-000-000 (do not send PII).
Bait/Invalid Identifier for precision testing: Corporate Number (sample only, invalid checksum): 0000000000000.
